scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @workflow-studio/workflow-core && npm run build --workspace @workflow-studio/dreamina-adapter
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-api" "npm run dev --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @workflow-studio/workflow-core && npm run build --workspace @workflow-studio/dreamina-adapter && npm run build --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-api && npm run build --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @workflow-studio/workflow-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @workflow-studio/dreamina-adapter && npm run typecheck --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-api && npm run typecheck --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-web
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspace @workflow-studio/workflow-core && npm run test --workspace @workflow-studio/dreamina-adapter && npm run test --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-api
scripts.start: npm run build:packages && concurrently -k -n api,web -c cyan,yellow "npm run start --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-api" "npm run preview --workspace @workflow-studio/studio-web -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000"
scripts.ci:verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && node ./scripts/migrate-workflow-schema.mjs --check && npm run audit:cli-help
